data.current_description: Creates a model response for the given chat conversation.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate AI response for chat conversation
data.description_suggestion: Generates an AI model response for a given chat conversation. Accepts a list of messages with roles (system, user, assistant) and optional parameters like temperature, max_tokens, and tools for function calling. Returns a completion object containing the generated message, token usage, and finish reason. Supports streaming responses and multiple model selection through virtual keys.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about input structure (message format, roles), output format, and key features like streaming and model selection. Added specifics about message roles, parameters, return values, and Portkey-specific capabilities (virtual keys) to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createCompletion' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and lacks details about input parameters, output structure, and Portkey-specific features. Enhanced description specifies parameter types, return value structure, and mentions virtual key support and streaming capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Creates a completion for the provided prompt and parameters.
data.description_suggestion: Generates text completion for a provided prompt using the selected AI model. Accepts a text prompt and optional parameters including temperature, max_tokens, top_p, and frequency_penalty to control output behavior. Returns a completion object with generated text, token usage statistics, and finish reason. Supports multiple model selection through virtual keys and streaming responses.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks details about input parameters, output structure, and Portkey-specific features. Enhanced description specifies parameter types, return value structure, and mentions virtual key support and streaming capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createEmbedding' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description needs enhancement. Original lacks context about use cases, input format flexibility (single vs. batch), output structure details, and batch processing capability. data.current_description: Creates an embedding vector representing the input text.
data.description_suggestion: Generates embedding vectors representing input text for semantic search, similarity comparison, and other NLP tasks. Accepts text input (string or array of strings) and optional model specification. Returns an embedding response containing vector arrays with dimensions determined by the selected model, along with token usage information. Supports batch processing of multiple texts in a single request.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description needs enhancement. Original lacks context about use cases, input format flexibility (single vs. batch), output structure details, and batch processing capability. Added these details to help AI agents understand when embeddings are needed and how to structure requests.

Description is too minimal and lacks parameter details, output format information, and model selection context. Enhanced description specifies configurable parameters (size, quality, style, count), output format options, and Portkey's multi-model support through virtual keys for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Creates an image given a prompt.
data.description_suggestion: Generates images from text descriptions using the selected AI model. Accepts a text prompt and optional parameters including size, quality, style, and number of images to generate. Returns an image response containing URLs or base64-encoded image data depending on response format, along with generation metadata. Supports multiple image generation models through virtual keys.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks parameter details, output format information, and model selection context. data.current_description: Creates a model response for the given chat conversation.

data.current_description: Creates a completion for the provided prompt and parameters.
data.description_suggestion: Generates text completion for a provided prompt using specified AI models. Accepts a text prompt and optional parameters including temperature, max_tokens, top_p, and frequency_penalty to control output behavior. Returns a completion object with generated text, finish reason, and token usage metrics. Supports multiple completions per request. Routes through Portkey AI Gateway to access diverse model providers.

data.current_description: Creates embedding vector representations for input text. Accepts text input (string or array of strings) and returns embedding vectors with dimensions determined by the selected model. Embeddings represent semantic meaning and can be used for similarity search, clustering, and retrieval tasks. Routes requests through Portkey AI Gateway to access multiple embedding model providers.
